name: ginkgolide b
summary: Terpene lactone from Ginkgo biloba affecting platelet activating factor.
description: Ginkgolide B modulates platelet-activating factor signaling, providing a mechanistic basis for reduced inflammatory and thrombotic pathway activation.
safetyNotes: Human hemostasis evidence is for standardized whole Ginkgo biloba leaf extracts, not isolated ginkgolide B, and did not show higher bleeding risk in the analyzed trials. Isolated-compound pregnancy, breastfeeding, surgery, seizure, liver, kidney, and medication-interaction safety remains insufficient.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
